mnemonics.title: Deadlock Conditions
mnemonics.content: My Horse Cannot Race - Mutual exclusion, Hold and wait, Circular wait, No preemption

mnemonics.title: Banker's Algorithm Steps
mnemonics.content: CAN Request - Check Request ≤ Need, Check Request ≤ Available, New state: Available = Available - Request, Allocation = Allocation + Request, Need = Need - Request
